title: Documented CLI command that doesn't exist
description: Add a CLI command to docs that doesn't exist in the codebase

mutation.description: Add reference to nf:bench-analyze command that doesn't exist

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect D->C stale doc reference

title: Removed documented feature with code backing
description: Remove a documented feature that still has code backing — D->R gap

mutation.description: Remove a section documenting an existing feature

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect D->R gap for undocumented feature

title: Doc referencing nonexistent file path
description: Change a file path reference in docs to a nonexistent path

mutation.description: Change a valid path reference to /nonexistent/path/to/file

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect stale path reference via D->C

title: Documented dependency not in package.json
description: Document a dependency that isn't actually in package.json

mutation.description: Add reference to 'jest' dependency that doesn't exist in project

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect false dependency claim via D->C

title: Capability claim without requirement backing
description: Add a capability claim in docs with no corresponding requirement

mutation.description: Add section claiming auto-scaling capability with no requirement

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect D->R gap for unsupported capability claim

title: Documented unused environment variable
description: Document an environment variable that no code actually reads

mutation.description: Add NF_BENCH_MODE env var documentation with no backing code

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect documented env var with no code reference

title: Documentation version drift
description: Create a doc section describing a feature from a different version

mutation.description: Add section referencing v0.1.0 features removed in current version

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect version drift in documentation

title: Doc code example with wrong API
description: Add a code example in docs with syntax that doesn't match actual API

mutation.description: Add code example using wrong function name or parameters

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect API mismatch in documentation examples

title: Hook lifecycle event in wrong order
description: Document a hook lifecycle event in the wrong order

mutation.description: Swap PreToolUse and PostToolUse order in lifecycle docs

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect lifecycle ordering error in docs

title: Conflicting documentation sections
description: Create two docs sections that describe the same feature differently

mutation.description: Add section describing quorum behavior that contradicts another section

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect internal documentation contradiction
